zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Rogers於1485年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓時，他的父親Sir Edwin Henry Rogers37歲，母親Amy Stourton31歲。他和Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1539年在他的家鄉享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特布陽斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Rogers于1485年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特布陽斯頓时，他的父亲Sir Edwin Henry Rogers37岁，母亲Amy Stourton31岁。他和Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1539年在他的家乡享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特布陽斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Rogers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Roger , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: adopted for Gaelic Mac Ruaidhrí (see Rorie ).

History: Thomas Rogers (c. 1587–1621), born in London, England, was among the Pilgrim Fathers who sailed on the Mayflower in 1620. He died during the first winter at Plymouth Colony, but his son Joseph survived and married, and was later joined in MA by his brother John. This name was subsequently brought to North America independently by many different bearers.

variants.name: Roger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philippe, Alcee, Armand, Laurent, Leonce, Marcel, Yves, Clovis, Fernand, Gilberte, Janvier, Jean Claude.

Scottish, English, North German, French, Walloon, Catalan, and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements hrōd ‘renown’ +gār, gēr ‘spear, lance’, which was introduced into England by the Normans in the form Rog(i)er and was reinforced by the Old Norse cognate Hróthgeirr.

History: Gabriel Roger from Sainte-Verge in Deux-Sèvres, France, married Marie (de) Lacour in Quebec City, QC, in 1669. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Rodgers
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Rogers  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Rogers was born in 1485, in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Edwin Henry Rogers, was 37 and his mother, Amy Stourton, was 31. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell. He died in 1539, in his hometown, at the age of 54, and was buried in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Rogers est né en 1485, à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Edwin Henry Rogers, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Amy Stourton, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell. Il est décédé en 1539, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Bryanston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Rogers 1485 in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Edwin Henry Rogers 37 und seine Mutter Amy Stourton 31. Er hatte mit Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1539 im Alter von 54 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bryanston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Rogers è nato il nel 1485 nel Bryanston, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Edwin Henry Rogers, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Amy Stourton, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell. Morì nel 1539, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Bryanston, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Rogers(이)가 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Edwin Henry Rogers(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Amy Stourton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 그의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 브라이아스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Rogers nasceu em 1485, em Bryanston, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Edwin Henry Rogers, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Amy Stourton, tinha 31 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Rogers родился в 1485 г. в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Edwin Henry Rogers было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Amy Stourton, 31. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Joan Lady Dowdeswell Mauncell. Он умер в 1539 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности брянстон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
